gist.headline: Exorcising ghost modules
gist.blurb: We swept away some orphaned git submodules that were haunting our CI pipelines. The codebase is now a little cleaner and our automated tests are much happier.
gist.summary: Removed orphaned git submodule entries that were causing CI pipeline errors.
gist.impact: Developers will no longer see fatal git warnings about missing submodule URLs during automated runs.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old dusty folders or ghost-like code snippets, while Polly the bee watches with a tiny broom.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating dusty, ghost-like folders while the cute bee mascot sweeps up with a tiny broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
